# Forumz discussion starters

Run after first publish:

```powershell
.\scripts\seed-forumz-discussions.ps1
```

Categories seeded:

| Category | Starter topic |
|----------|----------------|
| Announcements | v1.0.1 release post |
| General | Welcome thread |
| Q&A | Install troubleshooting |
| Ideas | Feature roadmap poll |
| Show and tell | Board embed receipts |

Manual fallback: copy bodies from `scripts/seed-forumz-discussions.ps1`.
